style_reference.executive_summary: A comprehensive birth doula package providing non-medical emotional, physical, and educational support through pregnancy, labor, birth, and immediate postpartum. Includes prenatal meetings, on-call coverage around the estimated due date, continuous labor support, cesarean emotional support when permitted, and a postpartum follow-up visit.

recommended_services.name: Prenatal support
recommended_services.description: One to two prenatal meetings with client and partner to review birth preferences, concerns, and expectations; reasonable phone and email availability throughout pregnancy.

recommended_services.name: Labor and birth support
recommended_services.description: Phone/text guidance when labor begins; in-person support once contractions are consistent. Continuous presence through labor and birth, including induction coordination and backup doula after prolonged labor if needed.
recommended_services.frequency: On call from 2 weeks before through 2 weeks after EDD

recommended_services.name: Immediate postpartum support
recommended_services.description: Approximately two hours after birth for comfort and breastfeeding initiation if desired; follow-up visit within two weeks.

style_reference.timeline: On-call window begins two weeks before estimated due date and ends two weeks after. Agreement valid for 24 hours from issuance to secure availability.
style_reference.pricing: Total package typically $2,500–$2,800: one-third deposit due upon signing (non-refundable), remaining balance due before estimated due date (non-refundable). Payment via Zelle, Venmo, Cash App, cash, or card (3% processing fee on Venmo/card). No refunds for cesarean births; fees refunded only if TNP cannot provide support and no qualified backup is available.
style_reference.next_steps: Review agreement, sign within 24 hours, submit deposit, and confirm estimated due date and assigned doula. Contact doula when labor begins; use text only 10pm–6am unless urgent or in active labor.

title: Birth doula services agreement (virtual agreement format)

style_reference.executive_summary: Standard birth doula scope delivered under a virtual agreement format, emphasizing educational and emotional support, clear scope-of-practice boundaries, and third-party authorization for care coordination among TNP team and healthcare providers.

recommended_services.name: Prenatal education and planning
recommended_services.description: Prenatal meetings and ongoing communication to prepare for labor, including preference review and expectation setting.

recommended_services.name: Labor support
recommended_services.description: Remote guidance until in-person support is appropriate; continuous support once active labor support begins.

style_reference.timeline: Same on-call window as standard birth doula agreements; virtual agreement revision noted in contract header.
style_reference.pricing: Representative total fee near $2,300 with proportional deposit and balance schedule; non-refundable deposit at signing, balance before due date.
style_reference.next_steps: Sign virtual agreement promptly, authorize TNP collaboration with care team as outlined, and establish labor communication preferences.

style_reference.executive_summary: High-hour overnight postpartum care package for the first six weeks after birth, combining physical newborn and household support, evidence-based education, and emotional support. Minimum session lengths apply; Carrot Fertility benefit timing may require completion within six weeks of discharge.

recommended_services.name: Overnight postpartum shifts
recommended_services.description: 10-hour night shifts in weeks 1–2, tapering in weeks 3–6. Physical support includes feeding, soothing, nursery organization, light housework, and baby laundry when requested.
recommended_services.frequency: Example: 6 nights/week weeks 1–2, 5 nights/week weeks 3–6 (320 total hours)

recommended_services.name: Informational and emotional support
recommended_services.description: Postpartum recovery guidance, infant care education, referrals, listening, and collaborative planning.

style_reference.timeline: Schedule agreed between client and assigned doula after birth notification; 48-hour notice preferred for scheduling changes. Carrot Fertility hours must be used within six weeks of discharge when applicable.
style_reference.pricing: Representative intensive package near $25,600: 50% due upon signing (non-refundable), 50% after first week of service (non-refundable). Additional hours and holiday premiums per TNP discretion. Venmo/card 3% processing fee.
style_reference.next_steps: Contact TNP after birth to schedule first session, confirm shift calendar with assigned doula, and review illness/mask preferences and no-solicitation policy.

style_reference.executive_summary: Structured postpartum doula agreement for overnight newborn care with defined hour minimums, illness policies, scope limitations, and Carrot Fertility benefit timing. Emphasizes non-medical support, schedule commitment, and safety policies for family and doula.

recommended_services.name: Overnight newborn care shifts
recommended_services.description: 10-hour night shifts on an agreed weekly schedule (example: 3 nights per week for 4 weeks, 120 total hours).

recommended_services.name: Daytime postpartum support
recommended_services.description: Minimum 4-hour day sessions when scheduled; feeding, soothing, light household support, and emotional adjustment support.

style_reference.timeline: Services begin on or after estimated due date or hospital discharge; not on-call before EDD unless written arrangement. Carrot benefits must be completed within six weeks when applicable.
style_reference.pricing: Representative package near $9,600: 50% due at signing, 50% after first week; all fees non-refundable. Additional hours via amended agreement. Holiday premiums may apply.
style_reference.next_steps: Notify TNP after birth, honor confirmed schedule, disclose household illness promptly, and return signed agreement with payment within 24-hour offer window when possible.
